title: Reminiscences of Dan Raymond, North Coast Vintage Aviation Society oral history transcript
creator: Strang, Mickey
North Coast Vintage Aviation Society
description: Please visit the California Revealed website to see the most complete and up-to-date version of this object: https://californiarevealed.org/node/523406 .

A typewritten transcript of Dan Raymond's oral history interview for the North Coast Vintage Aviation Society. He was drafted into the military while still a senior in high school to serve in the Army during World War II. Topics discussed include Army physicals, Army sex lectures and their effectiveness, being a part of the air crew for B-24s, and the politics of weekend leave.
